task: Write a LinkedIn outreach message

input.purpose: Recruiting for Senior Backend Engineer role

output:
Hi {{firstName}},

I came across your profile and was impressed by your work at DataFlow. We're helping a fast-growing company find a Senior Backend Engineer, and your experience leading engineering teams makes you a great fit.

Would you be open to a quick chat this week?

Best,
Sarah

task: Write a follow-up email after no reply
output:
Subject: **Quick follow-up on our proposal**

Hi {{firstName}},

I wanted to circle back on the partnership proposal I sent on March 10. I know things get busy — just wanted to make sure it didn't slip through the cracks.

I'd love to find 15 minutes to walk you through the key points. Would next Tuesday or Wednesday work?

Best regards,
Michael Torres
NexGen Solutions

task: Write a cold outreach email in Spanish
output:
Subject: Optimice su marketing analytics con CloudMetrics

Estimado/a {{firstName}},

Me dirijo a usted desde CloudMetrics para presentarle nuestra plataforma de analytics que está ayudando a empresas como Grupo Ibérica a mejorar su ROI de marketing en un 40%.

Nos encantaría mostrarle un quick demo personalizado para su equipo.

¿Tendría disponibilidad esta semana para una breve conversación?

Atentamente,
Carlos Mendoza
CloudMetrics

task: Write an event invitation
output:
Subject: You're Invited: AI in Recruiting Summit 2025 in Berlin!

Hi {{firstName}},

We're thrilled to invite you to the AI in Recruiting Summit 2025 — happening April 15 in Berlin!

This year's lineup features leaders from Google, Anthropic, and LinkedIn sharing how AI is transforming talent acquisition. As someone in the industry, we think you'd love it.

Early bird tickets are available until March 30.

Hope to see you there!

The TalentTech Team

task: Write a customer success check-in email
output:
Subject: Checking in — how's everything going at BrightPath?

Hi {{firstName}},

I noticed your team's dashboard usage has dropped 40% over the past month and wanted to check in. Is everything okay? Sometimes a quick walkthrough of new features can reignite things.

I'd love to hop on a 15-minute call to make sure you're getting the most out of DataPulse. No agenda — just here to help.

Warmly,
Jessica Liu
Customer Success, DataPulse

task: Write a meeting summary email

action_items: Tom: engineering capacity plan by March 25

output:
Subject: Meeting Notes — Q2 Roadmap Planning

Hi team,

Here's a summary of today's Q2 roadmap planning session.

**Key Decisions:**
1. Mobile app will be the primary focus for Q2
2. Enterprise features pushed to Q3
3. Two additional engineers to be hired

**Action Items:**
- Sarah: Mobile wireframes by March 28
- Tom: Engineering capacity plan by March 25
- Mark (CEO): Approve hiring budget by end of week

**Next Meeting:** April 1

Let me know if I missed anything.

Best,
Alex

task: Write a product update announcement
output:
Subject: 🚀 Smart Filters 2.0 is Here!

Hi there,

We're excited to announce **Smart Filters 2.0** for FlowBoard, launching March 20!

Here's what's new:

• **Saved Filter Presets** — Save your favorite filter combinations and apply them with one click
• **Cross-Board Filtering** — Search across all your boards simultaneously
• **Natural Language Search** — Just type what you're looking for in plain English

These updates are available to all users starting March 20. No action needed — just open FlowBoard and try it out.

Happy filtering!
The FlowBoard Team

task: Write a LinkedIn outreach message in German

input.purpose: Recruiting for CTO role at a Series B startup

output:

Ich habe Ihr Profil bei AutoTech GmbH gesehen und bin beeindruckt von Ihrer experience im Engineering-Bereich. Wir suchen derzeit einen CTO für ein Series B Startup mit starkem Wachstum.

Mit Ihrer Erfahrung in der Führung von Engineering-Teams wären Sie ein idealer Kandidat.

task: Write a rejection email to a job applicant

input.reason: Other candidate had more relevant enterprise experience

output:
Subject: Update on Your Application — Senior Product Designer at DesignLab

Dear {{firstName}},

Thank you for taking the time to interview for the Senior Product Designer role at DesignLab. We were impressed by your portfolio and thoughtful approach to design.

After careful consideration, we've decided to move forward with another candidate who had more extensive enterprise experience. We truly appreciate your interest and wish you the very best in your search.

Warm regards,
Hiring Team
DesignLab

task: Write a short internal Slack message

output: Hey team — heads up: staging is going down for maintenance from 10am to 12pm CET today. Engineering and QA, plan accordingly. Should be back up by noon. Ping me if you have questions!

task: Write an email asking for a referral
output:
Subject: Quick Ask — Know Any Great VP Sales Candidates?

Hi {{firstName}},

Hope you're doing well! I'm reaching out because we're helping a fast-growing SaaS company find their next VP of Sales, and I know you have an incredible network in the space.

If anyone comes to mind who might be a fit — someone with B2B SaaS experience and a track record of scaling teams — I'd love an intro. No pressure at all; even a name to look into would be helpful.

Thanks so much, Robert!

Warmly,
David Park
ConnectHR

task: Write a customer feedback request
output:
Subject: Quick question about your TaskPilot experience

Hey {{firstName}}!

You've been using TaskPilot for about 3 months now and I'm curious — what's your honest take? What's working well? What's frustrating?

No survey, no forms. Just hit reply and tell me in a few sentences. Your feedback directly shapes what we build next.

Thanks!
Sophie Miller
TaskPilot Team

task: Write a conference talk proposal rejection

input.reason: Too similar to another accepted talk

output:
Subject: Your EuroTech 2025 Talk Proposal — Update

Hi {{firstName}},

Thank you for submitting "Scaling Microservices in Regulated Industries" for EuroTech 2025. We received over 300 proposals this year and the selection was incredibly competitive.

Unfortunately, we weren't able to include your talk in this year's program due to its overlap with another accepted session on a very similar topic. Your proposal was strong, and we'd encourage you to submit again next year — perhaps with a more specific case study angle.

We'd also love to have you attend as a guest. Use code SPEAKER25 for a 30% discount.

Best,
EuroTech Program Committee

task: Write a payment reminder email
output:
Subject: Reminder: Invoice INV-2025-0847 — Payment Overdue

Dear {{firstName}},

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to remind you that invoice INV-2025-0847 for €4,500 was due on March 1, 2025, and remains outstanding.

Could you please arrange payment at your earliest convenience or let us know if there are any issues we can help resolve?

Please find the invoice attached for your reference.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Accounts Team
CloudServe

task: Write a product launch email for French market
output:
Subject: Découvrez SmartDash Pro — Lancement le 1er Avril 2025

Bonjour {{firstName}},

Nous sommes ravis de vous annoncer le lancement de SmartDash Pro, notre nouvelle plateforme de business intelligence, disponible dès le 1er avril 2025.

Les nouveautés qui vont transformer votre reporting :

• Suivi de KPIs en temps réel — Visualisez vos metrics clés instantanément
• Détection d'anomalies par IA — Soyez alerté avant que les problèmes ne s'aggravent
• Rapports pour le board en un clic — Générez des présentations professionnelles automatiquement

Nous serions honorés de vous offrir un accès anticipé. Répondez à cet email pour réserver votre place.

Cordialement,
L'équipe MetricFlow

task: Write a partnership proposal email

input.partnership_idea: Integrate SkillMap's assessment engine into EduTech's learning platform

output:
Subject: Partnership Idea: SkillMap + EduTech Global

Dear {{firstName}},

I'm reaching out from SkillMap to explore a potential partnership between our companies. We've been following EduTech Global's growth in the corporate learning space and believe there's a compelling opportunity to collaborate.

The idea: integrate SkillMap's skills assessment engine directly into EduTech's learning platform. This would allow your users to take pre- and post-training assessments, giving them — and their employers — measurable proof of skill development.

We currently serve 200+ enterprise clients and our assessment library covers 500+ technical and soft skills. We project this integration could increase your platform's engagement by 30-40% based on our data from similar partnerships.

Would you be open to a 30-minute call to explore this further?

Best regards,
Liam Chen
Head of Business Development
SkillMap

task: Write a short testimonial request via LinkedIn

input.context: They've been a happy customer for 1 year

output:
Hi {{firstName}}! 👋

It's been a year since you started using HireWise and I remember you mentioning that your time-to-hire dropped from 45 to 22 days — that's incredible.

Would you be willing to share a quick 2-3 sentence testimonial about your experience? It would mean a lot to our team and help other recruiting leaders discover what's possible.

Totally understand if you're too busy — no pressure at all!

Thanks,
Kate Robinson

task: Write an internal announcement about a new hire

input.background: 10 years at Salesforce, led EMEA CS team of 40

output:
Subject: Welcome Elena Kowalski — Our New Director of Customer Success!

Team,

I'm excited to announce that **Elena Kowalski** will be joining us as Director of Customer Success, starting April 7!

Elena brings 10 years of experience from Salesforce, where she led the EMEA Customer Success team of 40 people. She's passionate about building customer relationships that last — and she brings some serious energy to everything she does (she's run 3 marathons and speaks 4 languages!).

She'll be reporting to our CRO and working closely with Sales, Product, and Support.

Please join me in giving Elena a warm welcome when she starts. Feel free to drop her a note at elena@company.com.

Let's go! 🎉
